Shell.CancelConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel the installation?
Welcome.Title: Welcome to MultiAccess setup
Welcome.Body: The installation wizard installs MultiAccess (8.9.0) on your computer. Click Next to continue or Cancel to leave the installation wizard.
License.Title: End-User License Agreement
License.Subtitle: Please read the following license agreement carefully
License.AcceptCheckbox: I accept the terms in the License Agreement
License.Text:
LICENSE AGREEMENT

© Copyright ASSA ABLOY OPENING SOLUTIONS SWEDEN AB. All rights reserved.

This is a legal agreement between you, the end user and ASSA ABLOY OPENING SOLUTIONS SWEDEN AB. If you do not agree to the terms of this agreement, please cancel the installation.

1. GRANT OF LICENCE
ASSA ABLOY OPENING SOLUTIONS SWEDEN AB permits you to use copies of the software on single computers or on a single hard disk for use by you.

2. COPYRIGHT
The SOFTWARE is owned by ASSA ABLOY OPENING SOLUTIONS SWEDEN AB and is protected by Swedish copyright laws, international treaty provisions and other applicable laws.

3. OTHER RESTRICTIONS
You may not reverse engineer, decompile or disassemble the software except as permitted under mandatory laws. You may not amend or make changes to the software.

InstallationType.AdvancedDescription: Choose this to be able to freely customize your installation. For example, if you need to do any of the following, an advanced installation should be selected.
InstallationType.AdvancedDetail4: 4. Connect to existing SQL server, local or accessible
InstallationType.AdvancedDetail6: 6. Choose whether the software should be installed

MSAdvancedSettings.Title: MultiServer Advanced Settings
MSAdvancedSettings.DsnWarningFormat: DSN name, {0}, already exists. Observe if using this name the installation will not overwrite existing settings.
MSAdvancedSettings.ServiceWarning: If the account name is changed the new account must be of type service account to have permission to start MultiServer as a service.
MSAdvancedSettings.IntegratedSecurityNot: If integrated security is used make sure that the service account have correct permissions to the database.
